reviewed_commit_note: uncommitted delivery on feature branch (claim_language.py + tests + run_metadata CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN + evidence pack); HEAD base d54ecd8

commands_rerun.cmd: python3 adversarial falsification harness against scripts.lib.claim_language
commands_rerun.notes: Core bad paths blocked; synonym/bypass residuals documented; CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN overlap 7/7 with LANGUAGE_CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN; tests import shipped APIs

falsification_attempts: Empty orphan L1401 text='': implementer did not claim flip; still open. Fail to falsify process honesty — cannot authorize flip.
absence_is_not_no_tender(has_valid_query=False, text='sem licitação…'): ok=False. Fail to falsify main path.
absence synonym 'zero editais encontrados' with has_valid_query=False: ok=True (pattern miss). Residual synonym gap — does not break primary rule API.
absence without text + no valid query: ok=True with recommended_status NOT_CONSULTED (advisory). Acceptable design for non-claiming path.
winners claim_complete=True: ok=False. Fail to falsify flag path. COMPLETE_MARKET_PATTERNS defined but unused by winners API (text not scanned) — residual.
unidentified participant_id=None treated_as_nonexistent=True: ok=False; empty string also blocked. Fail to falsify.
win_rate proposals None/0/-1: ok=False. Fail to falsify denominator guard. Residual: wins>proposals still ok=True (rate>1 allowed).
score label probabilidade_vitoria uncalibrated: ok=False; ranking_score OK; calibrated probabilidade OK. Residual: 'chance_de_vitoria' and 'prob_vitoria' not blocked.
report_has_limitations([]) and whitespace-only: ok=False. Fail to falsify.

text_forbids_works_tracking positive claim: ok=False. Fail to falsify core pattern. Soft synonyms (acompanhamento de obras without 'físico', medicao sem acento) miss — residual. 'exceto …' can false-positive.
Tests reimplement guards instead of calling shipped code?: Fail to falsify — imports and invokes all 7 public guards + LANGUAGE_CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN.
run_metadata CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN missing §25 rules?: Fail to falsify — 7/7 LANGUAGE_CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN present in CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN.

Guards wired into every report CLI?: Successfully note gap — only tests + CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN string list; no runtime import of claim_language in report generators. Same bar as value_semantics library slice; bound claim to executable library rules, not full corpus enforcement.

issues.description: claim_language is library + unit-proof only; no production report/CLI path imports and enforces ClaimCheckResult at generation time (only CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN strings extended in run_metadata).
issues.recommendation: Follow-up story: wire report_has_limitations / text_forbids_works_tracking / absence guards into canonical report builders and CI scan of docs.

issues.description: COMPLETE_MARKET_PATTERNS is defined but never used by winners_are_not_complete_competitors (flag-only API).
issues.recommendation: Either scan claim text with COMPLETE_MARKET_PATTERNS or drop unused patterns to avoid theater constants.

issues.description: Pattern synonym gaps: absence ('zero editais'), score ('chance_*', 'prob_*'), works (without 'físico', unaccented medicao).
issues.recommendation: Expand pattern lists in a dedicated hardening story if corpus false-greens appear.

issues.description: win_rate allows wins > proposals_submitted (rate > 1.0) when denominator > 0.
issues.recommendation: Optional assert wins <= proposals_submitted or flag details['anomaly'].

issues.description: Delivery uncommitted on feature branch (claim_language.py, tests, run_metadata, evidence pack).
issues.recommendation: @dev commit before @po flip + @devops publish; QA did not commit.

allowed_claims: Executable §25 claim-language guards exist in scripts/lib/claim_language.py for absence≠no-tender, winners≠complete market, unidentified≠nonexistent, win_rate needs proposals, score≠probability without calibration, reports need limitations, no physical works-tracking claim.
Unit tests (9 passed) call shipped guards; independent re-run exit 0.
CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN in run_metadata extended with 7 LANGUAGE_CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN entries.
Empty orphan checkbox at DOD.md:1401 remains open (no false green).
forbidden_claims: Every historical report CLI path enforces claim_language at runtime.
Full monorepo document corpus proven free of works-tracking product claims via exhaustive scan.
Pattern coverage is synonym-complete (zero editais / chance / unaccented forms).
Empty DoD orphan line is DONE.
Story Done without PO close / DoD flipped without this independent verdict.

dod_flip_authorized.rationale: Empty orphan checkbox — no claimable requirement. Leave open. Do not flip.

dod_flip_authorized.text: Ausência de dados não é chamada de ausência de licitação sem consulta válida.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: absence_is_not_no_tender blocks labeling absence as 'sem licitação' without valid query; unit tests + LANGUAGE_CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN entry.

dod_flip_authorized.text: Vencedor conhecido não é chamado de conjunto completo de concorrentes.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: winners_are_not_complete_competitors(claim_complete=True) → ok=False; tests prove; residual unused text patterns non-blocking for flag API.

dod_flip_authorized.text: Participante não identificado não é tratado como inexistente.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: unidentified_participant_not_nonexistent blocks treated_as_nonexistent without id; tests prove.

dod_flip_authorized.text: Win rate não é calculado sem propostas enviadas.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: win_rate requires proposals_submitted > 0; None/0 fail closed; good path returns rate details.

dod_flip_authorized.text: Score não é chamado de probabilidade sem calibração.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: score_is_not_probability blocks probabilidade/probability/p(win) without calibrated=True; ranking_score allowed.
report_has_limitations fails closed on empty/whitespace; bound to executable report-check API (library bar, same class as value_semantics).

dod_flip_authorized.text: Nenhum documento afirma que o projeto acompanha obras.
dod_flip_authorized.rationale: text_forbids_works_tracking + WORKS_TRACKING_PATTERNS block physical works-tracking claims; unit tests + CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN; corpus-wide CI wiring residual medium, not slice blocker under library-proof bar.
